Community Management

Discord and Facebook Group engagement scripts, moderation templates, and daily discussion prompts

Community Management

Ready-to-use scripts for Discord server and Facebook Group management. Includes channel structure, welcome messages, daily prompts, and moderation templates. Aligned with the HeyZack Brand Voice.

Discord Server Setup

Recommended Channel Structure

B2B Channels

📋 B2B PROPERTY MANAGERS
├── #pm-welcome (Rules, Getting Started)
├── #pm-portfolio-talk (Multi-property management)
├── #pm-roi-showcase (Energy savings data)
├── #pm-tech-questions (Installation, troubleshooting)
└── #pm-feature-requests (Vote on enterprise features)

🏨 B2B HOSPITALITY
├── #hospitality-welcome
├── #guest-experience (Automation ideas for hotels/Airbnb)
├── #hospitality-roi (Revenue impact discussions)
└── #hospitality-integrations (PMS, booking platforms)

B2C Channels

B2C HOMEOWNERS
├── #home-welcome (Rules, Getting Started)
├── #setup-help (Installation questions)
├── #automation-ideas (Share your favorite automations)
├── #energy-savings (Post your bill reductions)
├── #show-off (Home setup photos/videos)
└── #smart-home-refugees (For those fleeing SmartThings/Nest)

🔧 TECHNICAL
├── #integrations (Nest, Ring, Philips Hue compatibility)
├── #feature-requests (Vote on upcoming features)
└── #beta-testing (Early access program)

📢 ANNOUNCEMENTS
├── #campaign-updates (Launch day, stretch goals, shipping)
├── #media-mentions (Press, reviews, YouTuber coverage)
└── #weekly-digest (Curated highlights)

Welcome Messages

B2B Property Manager Welcome (Auto-DM)

Hey [Name]! 👋 

Welcome to the HeyZack B2B community—where property managers and hospitality 
operators swap war stories and smart building strategies.

**Quick Start:**
1. Head to #pm-portfolio-talk and introduce yourself (how many properties 
   you manage)
2. Check #pm-roi-showcase to see real energy savings from other operators
3. Got a specific building challenge? Drop it in #pm-tech-questions

**Exclusive Perk:** B2B backers get priority access to our portfolio 
dashboard beta (drops Q2 2026).

Looking forward to learning from your experience!

— The HeyZack Team

B2C Homeowner Welcome (Auto-DM)

Welcome to the HeyZack family!

We're the smart home community for people who've been burned by buggy 
ecosystems and false promises. You're in good company.

**Start Here:**
1. Introduce yourself in #home-welcome (what brought you to HeyZack?)
2. Peek at #show-off to see what's possible (real homes, not marketing renders)
3. Got setup questions? #setup-help has your back

**Pro Tip:** Check #automation-ideas for creative ways to use HeyZack that 
we never thought of.

Can't wait to see what you build!

— Team HeyZack

Server Pin Post (Rules)

— **COMMUNITY RULES & ETIQUETTE**

**The Golden Rules:**
1. **Be Helpful, Not Judgmental** – No "stupid questions" exist here
2. **Share Real Results** – Energy savings? Post your before/after bills
3. **Stay On-Topic** – Use the right channels (B2B in B2B, B2C in B2C)
4. **No Spam** – Promoting your own products = instant ban
5. **Respect Privacy** – Don't share others' personal info without consent

**Community Perks:**
• Early access to beta features
• Direct line to product team
• Exclusive backer-only stretch goals
• Monthly "Setup of the Month" spotlight ($100 HeyZack credit)

**Need Help?**
Ping @CommunityTeam or DM a moderator.

Let's build something amazing together. →

Daily Discussion Prompts (30-Day Rotation)

Week 1: Discovery & Problem Identification

DayChannelPrompt
1 (Mon)#pm-portfolio-talk / #home-welcome”Introduce yourself! Where are you based, and what’s the #1 thing driving you crazy about your current automation?“
2 (Tue)#pm-portfolio-talk”Property managers: What’s the most expensive ‘emergency’ service call you’ve had that HeyZack could have prevented?“
3 (Wed)#home-welcome”How many different apps are you juggling for your smart home right now? (My record is 9 😅)“
4 (Thu)#energy-savings”Energy bill confession time: What’s the highest monthly bill you’ve ever paid?“
5 (Fri)#show-off”Fun Friday: Show us your current smart home setup—the good, the bad, and the ‘why did I buy this?‘“
6 (Sat)#automation-ideas”What’s one automation you WISH existed but you’ve never seen anyone build?“
7 (Sun)#energy-savings”Sunday Reflection: If HeyZack saves you 25% on energy costs, what would you do with that extra money?”

Week 2: Product Education & Features

DayChannelPrompt
8 (Mon)#setup-help”What’s your biggest question about how HeyZack’s AI learning actually works?“
9 (Tue)#integrations”Poll Time! Which integration should we prioritize? (🔥 Nest, ⚡ Ring, 💡 Philips Hue, ❄️ Ecobee)“
10 (Wed)#guest-experience”Hospitality operators: What’s the one thing guests complain about most that automation could fix?“
11 (Thu)#feature-requests”If you could add ONE feature to HeyZack that doesn’t exist yet, what would it be?“
12 (Fri)#automation-ideas”Wrong Answers Only: What is the smart thermostat really for? 😂“
13 (Sat)#pm-portfolio-talk”Portfolio managers: What’s the ideal number of buildings to manage with zero additional staff?“
14 (Sun)#home-welcome”Sunday Wins: Share one thing HeyZack will help you finally accomplish.”

Week 3: Community Building & Social Proof

DayChannelPrompt
15 (Mon)#show-off”Setup Showcase Monday: Post a photo of where you plan to install your first HeyZack device!“
16 (Tue)#pm-roi-showcase”Property managers: What ROI metric do you use to justify new tech to ownership?“
17 (Wed)#smart-home-refugees”Refugee Stories: What was the breaking point that made you give up on SmartThings/Nest/Wink? 🛋️”
18 (Thu)#energy-savings”Let’s calculate: [Monthly Bill] × 0.25 = $___. Post your number! 💰“
19 (Fri)#automation-ideas”Friday Challenge: Describe your dream ‘Movie Night’ automation in 10 words or less.”
20 (Sat)#hospitality-integrations”Hospitality crew: Do you use a PMS? Which one? Let’s talk integrations.”
21 (Sun)#home-welcome”Lazy Sunday: What’s one task you wish HeyZack could do FOR you so you can relax?”

Week 4: Campaign Momentum & FOMO

DayChannelPrompt
22 (Mon)#campaign-updates”🚨 72 Hours to Early Bird Pricing! What’s the ONE device you’re backing first?“
23 (Tue)#pm-portfolio-talk”If you could deploy HeyZack in ONE building first to prove ROI, which property and why?“
24 (Wed)#feature-requests”Stretch Goal Voting: React to help decide! (🎯 Guest mode, 🔐 Security rules, 🌡️ Multi-zone climate)“
25 (Thu)#show-off”Who’s planning the most AMBITIOUS HeyZack setup? (100+ devices? Whole building?)“
26 (Fri)#automation-ideas”Fun Friday: Design the ultimate ‘I’m Home’ automation. Go wild. No limits.”
27 (Sat)#energy-savings”Real talk: How much would you need to save per month for HeyZack to ‘pay for itself’?“
28 (Sun)#home-welcome”Countdown: Campaign ends in 48 hours. What’s #1 you’re most excited about?”

Week 5+: Ongoing Themes

DayThemePrompt
MonMotivation Monday”What’s one goal you’re achieving this week (home or work)?”
TueTech Tuesday”Share a smart home tip that has nothing to do with HeyZack.”
WedWins Wednesday”Celebrate a win from this week—big or small!”
ThuThrowback Thursday”What was your first ‘smart’ device ever? (Mine was a Clapper 😂)“
FriFeature Friday”If you could name a HeyZack feature, what would you call it?”
SatStretch Goal Saturday”Vote on the next stretch goal unlock!”
SunSunday Reset”How will HeyZack give you more time to relax?”

Event Announcements

Launch Day Announcement

🚨 **WE'RE LIVE!** 🚨

The HeyZack campaign just went live on [Kickstarter/Indiegogo]!

🔗 **Back Now:** [Campaign Link]

**Early Bird Perks (First 500 Backers):**
• 40% off retail pricing
• Lifetime priority support
• Exclusive launch backer badge
• First in line for shipping (Q2 2026)

**Let's make history together.** Comment below when you back—we're tracking 
the first 100 backers for a special surprise 🎁

Tag someone who needs to see this! ⬇️

Stretch Goal Unlocked

🎉 **STRETCH GOAL UNLOCKED!** 🎉

You absolute legends just unlocked: **[Feature Name]**

**What This Means:**
[Explain feature in 2-3 sentences]

**Why It Matters:**
[Benefit for B2B / B2C backers]

**Next Stretch Goal:** $[Amount] = [Next Feature]
**Current Progress:** [Progress Bar] 67% there!

Keep sharing, keep backing—we're just getting started! →

React with 🔥 if you're pumped!

Mid-Campaign Update

📊 **MID-CAMPAIGN CHECK-IN**

Holy smokes. Here's where we're at:

[+] **[X] Backers** (Blew past our goal!)
[+] **$[Amount] Raised** (You're incredible)
[+] **[X] Countries** represented (Global movement!)

**Most Popular Pledge:** [Bundle Name] ([X]% of backers chose this)

**New This Week:**
🎬 Watch: [Team Member] answers your top 10 questions
📸 Sneak Peek: Behind-the-scenes manufacturing tour

**Ending Soon:**
⏰ Early Bird pricing expires in **72 HOURS**

Share with 1 person who needs HeyZack: [Campaign Link]

— Your grateful HeyZack team ❤️

Final 48 Hours Push

⏰ **FINAL 48 HOURS** ⏰

This is it. Campaign ends [Day, Date] at [Time Zone].

**What Happens After Campaign Ends:**
✗ No more discounted pricing
✗ No more launch backer exclusives
✗ You'll pay full retail (40-50% more)

**Last Chance Perks:**
• Lock in 40% off forever
• Lifetime priority support
• First batch shipping (Q2 2026)

**Haven't backed yet?** [Campaign Link]
**Want to upgrade your pledge?** Go to campaign page → Manage Pledge

Tag 3 people who are still on the fence. Let's finish strong! 💪

React with ⚡ if you're locked in!

Moderation Response Templates

Scenario 1: Price Objection

User says: “This seems expensive for what it is.”

Response:

Hey [Name]! Fair question—let's break it down:

**What You're Paying For:**
- Commercial-grade components (IP65 rated, -20°C to 60°C)
- Genuine AI learning (not just timers)
- No monthly subscriptions (competitors charge $5-15/mo per device)
- Bank-level encryption + local storage options

**Cost Comparison:**
- Nest setup (thermostat + 3 cameras + doorbell): ~$1,100 + $30/mo = $1,460 Year 1
- HeyZack equivalent: $780 total, $0/mo = $780 Year 1

Plus, average backer saves $47/month on energy = pays for itself in 16 months.

Does that help clarify?

Scenario 2: Shipping Delay Concerns

User says: “How do I know you’ll actually ship on time?”

Response:

Totally understand the skepticism—crowdfunding delays are infamous.

**What We've Done Differently:**
• Manufacturing partner locked in (producing for 8+ years)
• Prototypes already functional (not vaporware)
• Conservative timeline (Q2 2026 = buffer built in)
• Weekly production updates (you'll see EXACTLY where we're at)

**If We Miss Our Date:**
Partial refunds for every 30 days of delay (detailed in campaign FAQs).

Check out the 'Manufacturing Roadmap' section on the campaign page—we're 
serious about transparency. Questions?

Scenario 3: Technical Compatibility Question

User says: “Will this work with my existing Nest thermostat?”

Response:

Great question! Short answer: **Yes.**

HeyZack works alongside your Nest via the unified app—you'll control both 
from one interface. The AI learns patterns from both systems.

**Pro Tip:** If you ever want to replace the Nest, HeyZack thermostats 
integrate natively and cost 60% less. But zero pressure—we're designed 
to play nice with what you already own.

Full compatibility list: [Link]

Running another device brand? Let me know—I'll confirm!

Scenario 4: Privacy/Security Concern

User says: “How do I know my camera footage isn’t being sold?”

Response:

**We're glad you asked.** Privacy is non-negotiable for us.

**Here's Our Policy (Plain English):**
1. **Local Storage Default:** Cameras record to SD cards—footage never 
   touches our servers unless YOU enable cloud backup
2. **You Own Your Data:** We don't analyze, monetize, or share footage. Period.
3. **Bank-Level Encryption:** All cloud data is AES-256 encrypted
4. **Transparent Policy:** No legal jargon—read it at [Link]

**Business Model Clarity:**
We make money selling hardware, NOT subscriptions or data harvesting.

Annual third-party security audits (results published publicly).

Does that address your concern?

Scenario 5: FUD / Trolling

User says: “This is just another Kickstarter scam.”

Response:

We get it—crowdfunding skepticism is healthy. You should vet every campaign.

**Here's What We Can Point You To:**
- Functional prototypes (video demos in #media-mentions)
- Manufacturing partner with 8-year track record
- Transparent team bios (LinkedIn profiles linked on campaign)
- Refund policy clearly stated in FAQs

If you have specific concerns, we're happy to address them. But if you're 
just here to troll, we'll politely ask you to move along—this community 
is for constructive discussion.

Anyone else have *genuine* questions about credibility? We're an open book.

Scenario 6: Feature Request Overload

User says: “You NEED to add [Feature X] or I’m not backing.”

Response:

Love the passion! Feature requests are how we get better.

**Here's How We Prioritize:**
1. Drop it in #feature-requests with your use case details
2. Community upvotes (React with 👍)
3. Product team reviews top 10 monthly
4. High-demand features → roadmap

**Reality Check:** We can't promise every feature will make it in 
(engineering tradeoffs are real), but we DO read every request.

[Feature X] specifically: Let's get the community's take. Everyone 
interested in [Feature X], react to [User]'s message with 🔥!

Facebook Group Setup

Pin Post (Group Rules)

— **WELCOME TO THE HEYZACK COMMUNITY**

**Who We Are:**
A community for property managers, hospitality operators, and homeowners 
who are done with fragmented systems and want automation that actually *learns*.

**Group Rules:**
1. **Be Respectful** – No personal attacks, even about thermostat brands 😄
2. **Stay On Topic** – HeyZack, smart home/building automation, energy efficiency
3. **No Spam** – Promoting your own products = removal (1st) or ban (repeat)
4. **Share Real Results** – Energy bill screenshots, setup photos = gold
5. **Help Others** – Answer questions if you know the answer

**What to Expect:**
📅 Weekly discussion themes (polls, case studies, challenges)
🎁 Monthly giveaways for top contributors
📢 Exclusive campaign updates + backer perks
🛠️ Direct access to the HeyZack product team

**New Here?** Comment below with:
- Name + Location
- Property manager, hospitality operator, or homeowner?
- What's your #1 automation frustration right now?

Let's build something amazing together! →

— The HeyZack Team

Weekly Facebook Themes

Week 1: The Energy Bill Challenge

💰 **WEEKLY THEME: The Energy Bill Challenge**

Post a screenshot of your most recent energy bill (blur personal info!), 
and let's calculate how much HeyZack could save you.

**Formula:**
[Monthly Bill] × 0.25 = [Potential Savings]

**Example:**
$240/month × 0.25 = $60/month = $720/year saved

**Bonus:** The person with the HIGHEST bill gets a personal energy audit 
from our team (and probably the most to gain from HeyZack 😅).

Drop your bill screenshot or total amount below! 👇

Week 2: Worst Smart Home Fail

😂 **WEEKLY THEME: Worst Smart Home Fail**

Share your most frustrating smart home story:

- The automation that woke your family at 3 AM
- The "smart" lock that locked you OUT
- The 7 apps you need just to turn on a light
- The $300 gadget that stopped working after an update

**Prize:** Best story wins a $50 Amazon gift card + our eternal sympathy.

Comment below—therapy session is OPEN! 🛋️

Week 3: Setup Showcase

📸 **WEEKLY THEME: Setup Showcase**

Show off your current smart home/building setup!

**We Want to See:**
- Your control panel/dashboard
- The "command center" of your home/property
- The device you're most proud of
- The corner of shame (devices you regret 😂)

**Most Impressive Setup** (as voted by reactions) wins a feature on our 
blog + $100 HeyZack credit.

Post photos in the comments! 👇

Week 4: Property Manager ROI Stories (B2B)

💼 **WEEKLY THEME: Property Manager ROI Stories**

Property managers & facility operators: Let's talk numbers.

**Share Your Experience:**
- How many properties do you manage?
- What's your annual energy cost across portfolio?
- Have you tried smart building tech before? What worked/didn't work?
- What ROI proof do you need to show ownership?

Best insight wins a 1-on-1 consultation with our B2B solutions architect.

Comment below! 👇

Poll Templates

Poll 1: Device Priority

📊 **POLL: What Should We Build Next?**

Help us prioritize! If you could ONLY choose ONE new HeyZack device:

🚪 Smart Garage Door Opener (WiFi + obstacle detection)
🔌 Smart Power Strips (per-outlet control + monitoring)
🎵 Multi-Room Audio System (whole-home music)
💧 Smart Leak Detectors (water + freeze sensors)

Vote by reacting:
🚪 = Garage Door | 🔌 = Power Strips | 🎵 = Audio | 💧 = Leak Detectors

Most votes by Friday = moves to top of roadmap!

Poll 2: Community Feature

📊 **POLL: What Community Feature Would You Use Most?**

🎥 Monthly live Q&A with the HeyZack team
📚 Weekly tutorial videos
🏆 Monthly automation challenges with prizes
👥 Local meetups in your city

Vote with reactions!
